<!-- What problem does this feature solve? -->

<!-- Detailed description of the proposed solution -->

## Algorithm/Environment Details

- [ ] **Algorithm**: New reinforcement learning algorithm
- [ ] **Environment**: New benchmark environment
- [ ] **Metric**: New evaluation metric

### Rust Implementation
<!-- How should this be implemented in Rust? -->

#### Core Components
<!-- What modules, structs, or functions are needed? -->

#### Dependencies
<!-- Any new dependencies required? -->

<!-- How does this integrate with existing code? -->

<!-- Should there be a Python baseline implementation? -->

#### Baseline Requirements
<!-- What should the baseline implement? -->

#### Dependencies
<!-- Python dependencies needed -->

## Evaluation Plan

### Benchmark Metrics
<!-- How should this be evaluated? -->

### Baseline Comparisons
<!-- What existing algorithms/environments should this be compared to? -->

### Success Criteria
<!-- What constitutes a successful implementation? -->

## Priority Assessment

### Importance
<!-- How important is this feature? -->

- [ ] **Critical**: Core functionality needed
- [ ] **High**: Important for completeness
- [ ] **Medium**: Nice to have
- [ ] **Low**: Minor enhancement

### Effort Estimate
<!-- Rough estimate of implementation effort -->

- [ ] **Low**: < 1 week
- [ ] **Medium**: 1-4 weeks
- [ ] **High**: 1-3 months
- [ ] **Very High**: > 3 months

## Additional Information

### Existing Implementations
<!-- Are there existing implementations we can reference? -->

### Alternative Approaches
<!-- Are there alternative ways to solve this problem? -->

### Potential Challenges
<!-- What challenges might arise during implementation? -->

## Contribution Interest

### Implementation Offer
<!-- Are you interested in implementing this feature? -->

- [ ] **Yes**: I plan to implement this
- [ ] **Maybe**: I might implement this
- [ ] **No**: I'm requesting this for others to implement

### Implementation Timeline
<!-- If you plan to implement, when do you expect to start? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the requested feature
- [ ] I have explained the problem this feature solves
- [ ] I have included relevant literature references (if applicable)
- [ ] I have described the proposed implementation approach
- [ ] I have considered integration with existing code
- [ ] I have suggested evaluation criteria
